claim_boundary: This contract prepares a future effective, analog-informed MEA-system fit. It does not execute a regression, promote a parameter, establish a unique single-ion volume, or support a predictive/source-complete claim.

missing_preconditions: Immutable source-bound or jointly regularized parameters and covariance for every acetate, propionate, butanoate, pentanoate, and hexanoate counterion used in the shared-cation stage
Installed native Regression density target with exact Provider reference basis, residual Jacobians, multistart diagnostics, and immutable receipt
Installed same-state Equilibrium plus Provider derivatives for reactive density and speciation constraints
A recorded identifiability amendment if the active set or objective changes

frozen_inputs.role: reported-derived diagnostic; never an independent residual beside its parent density
35 unloaded and 68 loaded direct density observations
existing frozen 147-training/220-validation pressure and speciation split

component_contract.provider_bundle_requirement: immutable installed artifact with component, parameter-source, domain, and tensor fingerprints

stages.name: shared_cation_analog
stages.state_problem: Single liquid phase at reported T, P, solvent identity, and ionic-liquid mole fraction; enforce the supplied electroneutral salt stoichiometry and evaluate mixture density.
stages.observations: Role-eligible training rows from ethanolammonium_carboxylate_density only; the four repeated Dhage pure-water endpoint rows remain contextual.
stages.objective: Sum squared density residuals divided by squared observation scales, then divide by the number of admitted rows in each salt/source family so no densely sampled family dominates.
stages.observation_scale: Augusto2022: max(row standard deviation, reported relative standard uncertainty times density). Dhage2026: reported combined absolute uncertainty 0.0005 g/cm^3.
stages.derived_quantity_policy: Excess molar volumes are recomputation and identifiability diagnostics only because they are derived from the same density rows; they are not simultaneous independent residuals.
stages.stop_condition: Stop as additional-data-required if fixed counterion priors/covariance are unavailable, if held-out salt curves fail uncertainty-scaled validation, or if MEAH+ size and dispersion cannot be distinguished from counterion terms.

stages.name: carbamate_correction
stages.state_problem: No isolated-ion state is permitted. The correction is evaluated only through an electroneutral reactive MEA liquid state.
stages.observations: Maiti bulk volume-change evidence is a directional plausibility constraint; Amundsen loaded density becomes a numerical target only in the same-state reactive stage.
stages.regularization: Quadratic penalty about the recorded provisional MEACOO- sigma prior. Its scale must be supplied by an immutable acetate-transfer uncertainty before execution; no default scale is authorized.
stages.stop_condition: Stop as additional-data-required if the prior scale is absent or if the correction cannot be distinguished from reaction constants and other mixture parameters.

stages.name: reactive_mea_refinement
stages.state_problem: At fixed reported T, pressure, unloaded MEA mass fraction, and CO2 loading, jointly solve reaction equilibria, elemental material balances, electroneutrality, and one liquid-phase EOS state. Evaluate density and eligible speciation observations from that identical converged state.
stages.observations: Training Amundsen density groups plus role-eligible training speciation targets from the existing frozen grouped split.
stages.conditional_parameter: MEAH+::MEACOO-::k_ij remains fixed. It may replace, not augment, an active correction only after a pre-fit amendment shows structured residuals and independent sensitivity.
stages.fixed_parameters: All reaction constants, Born diameters, trace-ion parameters, other component parameters, and all unlisted binary interactions.
stages.objective: Equal-weight family blocks for uncertainty-scaled density and eligible species/aggregate residuals, with exact zeros treated as upper-bound residuals and balance-inferred, ambiguous, contextual, diagnostic, and excluded records barred from the fitting objective.
stages.constraints: Elemental carbon and MEA balances, charge balance, reaction-equilibrium residuals, positive compositions, exact species order, and Provider applicability must all pass independently of optimizer termination.
stages.stop_condition: Reject if density improves while held-out speciation worsens, if mass/charge/reaction constraints fail, or if any active parameter remains prior- or bound-dominated.

stages.name: independent_validation
stages.observations: Only groups marked validation in the frozen volumetric and existing pressure/speciation split manifests.
metrics: density residual and residual divided by reported experimental uncertainty
species-specific and aggregate speciation residuals by measurement role
material, charge, and reaction-equilibrium residual norms
active-bound distance and start-to-start parameter spread
residual Jacobian singular values, Fisher conditioning, parameter correlations, and profile likelihoods
stages.acceptance: Every predeclared gate must pass; optimizer success or a lower training objective is insufficient.

parameter_bounds.source: Existing downstream BOUNDS in src/MEA/epcsaft_ionic/model.py are retained only as broad numerical safeguards, not as physical evidence.
parameter_bounds.rule: A solution materially dependent on a safeguard bound fails; tightening a bound requires a source-bound preregistration amendment.

initial_values.source: Current provisional historical-evaluation rows; seeds only.

multistart.design: 32 deterministic scrambled-Sobol starts in scaled active-parameter space plus the recorded provisional seed
multistart.report: All starts, terminations, final objectives, constraints, active bounds, parameter vectors, and immutable receipts.
multistart.material_dependence_rule: Reject when scientifically distinct parameter vectors achieve indistinguishable objectives or the accepted result is not reproduced across the best basin.

convergence_gates.optimizer: native Regression successful termination with finite objective and exact receipt
convergence_gates.equilibrium: every state carries an admitted Equilibrium certificate; failed states cannot be omitted or penalized into acceptance
convergence_gates.constraints: mass, charge, and reaction residual tolerances must be declared by the installed Equilibrium contract before execution
convergence_gates.provider: installed tensor shape, component order, charge, reference basis, applicability domain, and derivative checks pass
convergence_gates.identifiability: full-rank or explicitly profile-supported active block with reported conditioning; no material prior/start/bound dependence

immutable_successor_receipt: parameter identities, values, units, bounds, sources, and fitted domain
